ddls:
CREATE TABLE "livestock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "needed_size" INTEGER /* Needed size of the sample */,
  "max_k" INTEGER /* Maximum k-value for the sample */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha parameter for the sample */,
  "unknown_id" TEXT /* Identifier for unknown attributes */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the species with count and average position */,
  "pearson" REAL /* Pearson correlation coefficient for the sample */,
  "iso_id" TEXT /* ISO identifier for the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location where the sample was collected */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the researcher who collected the sample */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the research project associated with the sample */,
  "breeding_program_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the breeding program associated with the sample */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the sample */,
  "genetic_marker" TEXT /* Genetic marker information */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the animal */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_livestock_data_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_livestock_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_livestock_data_breeding_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("breeding_program_id") REFERENCES breeding_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_livestock_data_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "genetic_origin" TEXT /* Geographic origin of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species in kilograms */,
  "average_height" REAL /* Average height of the species in centimeters */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeding_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breeding program */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the species involved in the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the breeding program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the breeding program */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the research project associated with the program */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal of the breeding program */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the breeding program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the breeding program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breeding_programs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breeding_programs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Research focus of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES livestock_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
